rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Rundll32 Injection into LSASS

rules.rule_text:
title: Rundll32 Injection into LSASS
id: c6a45ac1-b909-423b-907b-a9bfde31ab9c
status: experimental
description: "The following pseudo-detector should help security teams detect instances\
  \ \nwhere Rundll32 opens a cross process handle into LSASS to collect credentials.\
  \ \nPart of the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/rundll32/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1218
- attack.t1218.011
- attack.t1055
logsource:
  category: process_access
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    SourceImage|endswith: \rundll32.exe
    TargetImage|endswith: \lsass.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
